about: About this itemWhy ThinkPad – Invest in What Lasts: ThinkPad may cost more than everyday laptops, but it’s built to last longer, perform better, and reduce downtime. Built on IBM’s legendary engineering DNA, it's designed for reliability, security, and long-term performance. It’s made for ambitious professionals, creators, and students who want both power and polish – with features that keep you moving confidently through work and life.Legendary ThinkPad Reliability – Built to Withstand Life: Tested on 12 MIL-STD-810H methods & 26 procedures, this ThinkPad is designed for rugged real-world use. Its aluminium top build resists knock, spills, and daily wear—ideal for frequent travellers, students, and professionals on the move.7th Gen AMD Ryzen 5 Power – Perfect for Multitasking: Powered by a 7th Gen AMD Ryzen 5 7535HS (6 Cores, 12 Threads, up to 4.55GHz, 16MB L3 Cache), this laptop delivers responsive performance for office work, online classes, multitasking, and daily computing needs.Fast Memory & Upgradeable Storage – Future-Ready: Comes with 16GB DDR5 RAM (4800 MHz), dual-channel capable and upgradable up to 64GB — ideal for smooth browsing, spreadsheets, and app handling. The 512GB (upgradable to 1TB) SSD ensures fast boot times, quick file access, and more storage for work or media.14” WUXGA Display – More Screen, Less Strain: Enjoy immersive visuals on the 14-inch (1920 x 1200) WUXGA IPS display with a taller 16:10 aspect ratio for more workspace. With 300 Nits brightness + anti-glare, it’s perfect for long hours of work, video calls, or binge-watching without eye strain.Dolby Atmos + AMD Radeon Graphics – Sharp Visuals & Crisp Sound: AMD Radeon Graphics with DirectX 12 enhances everyday visual tasks like video playback, presentations, and light design work.
